_description: Canonical OPTCG subtypes. Hand-maintained whitelist used by tools/normalize_cards.py to tokenize the space-concatenated sub_types strings returned by the upstream API. Matching is longest-prefix-first and case-insensitive; the matcher emits the canonical spelling from this list. New subtypes are added here only after explicit human review of the 'Unknown subtypes' section in docs/normalization_report.md.
_source: Discovered from ST01-ST04 raw API data (cards/raw/decks/ST-0N.json). 'Fallen Monk Pirates' is one compound subtype, not Fallen Monk + Pirates.
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
